text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Vote counting has officially begun for the Hungarian parliamentary elections. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Early list vote results with 2.86% counted show Fidesz–KDNP leading with 48.18% and 45 mandates, followed by TISZA with 43.38% and 39 mandates. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺匈牙利议会选举投票正式开始。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 早期名单投票结果显示，在已统计的2.86%选票中，青民盟-基民党（Fidesz–KDNP）以48.18%的得票率和45个席位领先，其次是TISZA党，得票率为43.38%，获得39个席位。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor I don't see the point of this. Trump: Effective immediately, the United States Navy, the Finest in the World, will begin the process of BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2043321288274419723/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我不明白这有什么意义。特朗普：即刻起，美国海军，这支世界上最优秀的军队，将开始对任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只实施封锁。https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2043321288274419723/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🗳️ 🇭🇺 Meanwhile, Péter Magyar has declared victory in Hungary’s parliamentary elections. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043390631213494656/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🗳️ 🇭🇺 与此同时，彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）已宣布在匈牙利议会选举中获胜。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043390631213494656/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: Netanyahu at the cabinet meeting: “President Trump understands that a foreign coalition will not succeed in disarming Hamas - we will have to do it.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043389560478896236/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息：内塔尼亚胡在内阁会议上表示：“特朗普总统明白，外国联盟无法成功解除哈马斯的武装——我们必须亲自去做。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043389560478896236/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Following claims earlier today by U.S. President Donald J. Trump that the United Kingdom and other countries will send minesweepers to the Middle East to assist in reopening the Strait of Hormuz, the British Government has announced that it is trying to bring together a “wide coalition” with France and others to ensure freedom of navigation through the waterway near Iran. “We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, which is urgently needed to support the global economy and the cost of living back home,” a Spokesperson with the British Government told CNN. “The Strait of Hormuz must not be subject to tolling. We are urgently working with France and other partners to put together a wide coalition to protect freedom of navigation.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 继美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普今天早些时候声称英国和其他国家将派遣扫雷舰前往中东以协助重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后，英国政府宣布正试图与法国及其他国家组建一个“广泛联盟”，以确保伊朗附近水道的航行自由。“我们继续支持航行自由和霍尔木兹海峡的开放，这对于支持全球经济和国内生活成本至关重要，”英国政府发言人告诉CNN。“霍尔木兹海峡不得被征收通行费。我们正紧急与法国和其他伙伴合作，组建一个广泛联盟来保护航行自由。” 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @panyiszabolcs : 💥 Polls closed in Hungary. No exit poll, but 21 Research Institute’s Apr 8–11 exclusive survey for @Telexhu shows Tisza leading Fidesz 55–38, with Our Homeland around the 5% threshold. Tisza is on the verge of a parliamentary supermajority. https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043375377922338999/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @panyiszabolcs : 💥 匈牙利投票结束。没有出口民调，但21研究中心（21 Research Institute）为 @Telexhu 做的4月8日至11日的独家调查显示，Tisza党以55%对38%领先青民盟，我们的祖国党（Our Homeland）在5%的门槛左右。Tisza党即将获得议会绝对多数席位。https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043375377922338999/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Polls have closed in Hungary’s parliamentary election, with turnout at 77.8% as of 18:30 local time, significantly higher than the 67.8% recorded in the 2022 vote. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Vote counting has officially begun for the Hungarian parliamentary elections. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺匈牙利议会选举投票结束，截至当地时间18:30，投票率为77.8%，显著高于2022年投票时记录的67.8%。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举投票正式开始。@wfwitness

text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @Mollyploofkins : 音频：伊朗警告美国驱逐舰，如果进入霍尔木兹海峡将遭到打击 https://twitter.com/Mollyploofkins/status/2043326180355461201/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian media: Two U.S. ships attempted to cross the Strait of Hormuz today. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗媒体：今天有两艘美国船只试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @LucasFoxNews : Vice President Vance’s final offer delivered to the Iranian delegation in Islamabad, which represent ‘red lines,’ according to two U.S. officials: 1. End all uranium enrichment 2. Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities 3. Retrieve highly enriched uranium 4. Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies 5. End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis 6. Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @LucasFoxNews : 万斯副总统向伊斯兰堡的伊朗代表团提交了最终提议，据两位美国官员称，这代表了“红线”：1. 停止所有铀浓缩；2. 拆除所有主要核浓缩设施；3. 收回高浓缩铀；4. 接受包括地区盟友在内的更广泛的和平、安全与降级框架；5. 停止资助哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装等恐怖主义代理人；6. 完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取任何费用。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🗳 Supporters of Péter Magyar are already gathering in Budapest to celebrate a potential victory. 🔹 According to an RBC-Ukraine correspondent, the atmosphere is positive, though some chants targeting Orbán’s party are being heard. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043387823122706663/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🗳 彼得·马扎尔的支持者们已经聚集在布达佩斯庆祝潜在的胜利。🔹 据RBC-乌克兰通讯社记者称，现场气氛积极，尽管听到了一些针对欧尔班政党的口号。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043387823122706663/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 The appointment of Roman Gofman, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s military secretary, as the next head of the Mossad has been postponed after the Senior Appointments Committee failed to reach unanimous approval. While a majority of committee…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The advisory committee for senior appointments has approved the candidacy of Major General Roman Gofman as head of the Mossad. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu signed the appointment letter. Gofman will take office on 2 June 2026 for a five‑year term replacing the current Mossad head David Barnea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书罗曼·戈夫曼（Roman Gofman）被提名为下一任摩萨德负责人，但在高级任命委员会未能达成一致批准后，该任命已被推迟。虽然委员会多数……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 高级任命咨询委员会已批准罗曼·戈夫曼少将担任摩萨德负责人的候选资格。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡签署了任命书。戈夫曼将于2026年6月2日上任，任期五年，接替现任摩萨德负责人大卫·巴尔内亚（David Barnea）。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel The U.K. says it will not help the U.S. blockade the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043387903221354648/video/1 The UK will not take part in the U.S.-led blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. "We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the strait, which is urgently needed to support the global economy," a government spokesperson told Sky News. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国表示不会协助美国封锁霍尔木兹海峡。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043387903221354648/video/1 英国不会参与美国领导的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。“我们继续支持航行自由和海峡的开放，这对于支持全球经济至关重要，”政府发言人告诉天空新闻台。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Iran’s parliament speaker responds to Trump’s naval blockade: • “Americans must decide whether they are ready to earn Iran’s trust or not.” • “Trump’s recent threats have no effect on the Iranian nation, we have proven it.” • “We had very intensive, serious, and challenging talks… we presented strong initiatives that showed goodwill and led to progress.” • “We do not trust the Americans… they must earn our trust, and that is difficult due to their past actions.” • “The Iranian nation is advancing on its path and relies on its own capabilities.” • “Our delegation was united, serious, and creative in defending Iran’s rights.” • “These threats have no effect… this is not a slogan, the world has seen it.” • “If America wants a way out, it must earn the trust of the Iranian nation.” • “If you fight, we will fight, and if you come with logic, we will respond with logic.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 伊朗议会议长回应特朗普的海上封锁：“美国人必须决定他们是否准备好赢得伊朗的信任。” • “特朗普最近的威胁对伊朗民族没有影响，我们已经证明了这一点。” • “我们进行了非常深入、严肃且具有挑战性的会谈……我们提出了展现善意并推动进展的强有力倡议。” • “我们不信任美国人……他们必须赢得我们的信任，由于他们过去的所作所为，这很困难。” • “伊朗民族正在自己的道路上前行，并依靠自身的能力。” • “我们的代表团在捍卫伊朗权利方面团结、严肃且富有创造力。” • “这些威胁没有影响……这不是口号，全世界都看到了。” • “如果美国想要出路，就必须赢得伊朗民族的信任。” • “如果你开战，我们就开战；如果你讲逻辑，我们就以逻辑回应。” 推文

text: WarTranslated Magyar’s supporters rallied again in Hungary. First results are expected soon, and polls from April 8 to 11 put Tisza at about 55 percent and Orban’s Fidesz at 38. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043387484248088783/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 马扎尔的支持者再次在匈牙利集会。预计很快会有初步结果，4月8日至11日的民调显示Tisza党约为55%，欧尔班的青民盟为38%。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043387484248088783/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Mehdi Fazaeli, member of Khamenei's office: The US and Israel thought that by assassinating the Leader the country would descend into chaos. Not only has that not happened, but the martyred Leader's path will continue with stronger resolve. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043387276416209047/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈梅内伊办公室成员迈赫迪·法扎利（Mehdi Fazaeli）：美国和以色列认为，通过暗杀领袖，国家会陷入混乱。不仅没有发生这种情况，殉难领袖的道路还将以更坚定的决心继续下去。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043387276416209047/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iran's IRGC says "Any military vessels that, under any pretext or excuse, intend to approach the Strait of Hormuz will be considered as violating the ceasefire and will be dealt with harshly and decisively" — Tasnim tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）表示：“任何以任何借口或理由试图接近霍尔木兹海峡的军事船只，都将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉和果断的处理” — Tasnim 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu visited southern Lebanon with the Israeli defense minister Israel Katz and IDF chief of staff Eyal Zamir, stating that “the war continues, including inside the security zone in Lebanon.” He said Israel has thwarted…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Against the backdrop of heightened tensions, the Israeli government is expected to convene on Monday to extend the “special situation on the home front” until the end of the month. Meanwhile, the Israeli Home Front Command is expected to announce significant restrictions for Independence Day celebrations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧以色列总理内塔尼亚胡与以色列国防部长以色列·卡茨（Israel Katz）及以色列国防军参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）访问了黎巴嫩南部，称‘战争仍在继续，包括在黎巴嫩境内的安全区内。’他说以色列已经挫败了……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在紧张局势加剧的背景下，预计以色列政府将于周一召开会议，将“国内前线特殊情况”延长至本月底。与此同时，以色列国内前线司令部预计将宣布对独立日庆祝活动实施重大限制。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 IRNA: The high-ranking Iranian delegation, headed by Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, left Islamabad for Tehran hours ago. Pakistani officials, including the deputy prime minister, National Assembly speaker…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, Returning from talks in Islamabad, said the U.S. must decide whether it is ready to earn Iran’s trust. “Our wall of distrust is 77 years old, and in less than a year they attacked us twice during negotiations,” he said. He thanked the Iranian people for their street presence, which he said helped defend Iran’s rights. The Iranian delegation – named “Minab 168” – worked for over 20 hours. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：由议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）率领的高级别伊朗代表团已于数小时前离开伊斯兰堡返回德黑兰。巴基斯坦官员，包括副总理、国民议会议长……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫在结束伊斯兰堡会谈返回后表示，美国必须决定是否准备好赢得伊朗的信任。“我们的不信任之墙已经有77年了，在不到一年的时间里，他们在谈判期间两次攻击我们，”他说。他感谢伊朗人民在街头的表现，称这有助于捍卫伊朗的权利。伊朗代表团——名为“Minab 168”——工作了超过20个小时。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇳🇬 At least 200 people are feared dead after a Nigerian airstrike hit a village market in Yobe state during an operation targeting militants, according to local officials and residents. The strike reportedly occurred near Jilli Market along the Yobe–Borno border, with casualties taken to nearby hospitals. The military says it targeted militants and has not confirmed striking the market. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇳🇬 据当地官员和居民称，尼日利亚一次针对武装分子的空袭击中了约贝州的一个乡村市场，造成至少200人恐慌死亡。据报道，空袭发生在约贝州与博尔诺州边界沿线的吉利市场（Jilli Market）附近，伤者已被送往附近医院。军方称其目标是武装分子，并未确认袭击了市场。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: If the Americans test our will again, we will give them an even bigger lesson.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：如果美国人再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Threats have no effect on the Iranian nation. We have proven that this is not a slogan—the world has seen it with its own eyes. We have shown that the enemy has reached a state of desperation. We have proven that we do not surrender under threats. Over 47 years of the revolution, in military arenas, economic sanctions, political pressure, and more, the Iranian people have demonstrated this in practice.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：威胁对伊朗民族没有影响。我们已经证明这不是口号——全世界都亲眼目睹了。我们已经表明敌人已陷入绝望状态。我们已经证明我们不会在威胁下投降。在革命的47年里，在军事领域、经济制裁、政治压力等方面，伊朗人民已经在实践中证明了这一点。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: If the United States wants to find a way out, the only path is to decide to earn the trust of the Iranian people. You are indebted to the Iranian nation and still have much to do to make amends. If you choose war, we will fight; if you come with logic, we will respond with logic. We will not submit to any threats. If they test our will again, we will give them a greater lesson.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：如果美国想找到出路，唯一的途径就是决定赢得伊朗人民的信任。你们欠伊朗民族的，还有很多事情要做以弥补。如果你们选择战争，我们就开战；如果你们讲逻辑，我们就以逻辑回应。我们不会屈服于任何威胁。如果他们再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: 🇺🇸 Watch the awkward moment when Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch forgets her lines (or her earpiece cuts out) and she just stands there looking awkward. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 观看阿尔忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫（Christina Koch）忘记台词（或耳机断开）的尴尬时刻，她只是站在那里显得很尴尬。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @LucasFoxNews : Vice President Vance’s final offer delivered to the Iranian delegation in Islamabad, which represent ‘red lines,’ according to two U.S. officials: 1. End all uranium enrichment 2. Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities 3. Retrieve highly enriched uranium 4. Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies 5. End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis 6. Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @LucasFoxNews : 万斯副总统向伊斯兰堡的伊朗代表团提交了最终提议，据两位美国官员称，这代表了“红线”：1. 停止所有铀浓缩；2. 拆除所有主要核浓缩设施；3. 收回高浓缩铀；4. 接受包括地区盟友在内的更广泛的和平、安全与降级框架；5. 停止资助哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装等恐怖主义代理人；6. 完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取任何费用。推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.K. is working with France and other partners to create a coalition to protect freedom of navigation. The UK will not take part in the U.S.-led blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. "We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the strait, which is urgently needed to support the global economy," a government spokesperson told Sky News. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国正与法国及其他伙伴合作，建立一个保护航行自由的联盟。英国不会参与美国领导的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。“我们继续支持航行自由和海峡的开放，这对于支持全球经济至关重要，”政府发言人告诉天空新闻台。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel The UK will not take part in the U.S.-led blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. "We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the strait, which is urgently needed to support the global economy," a government spokesperson told Sky News. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国不会参与美国领导的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。“我们继续支持航行自由和海峡的开放，这对于支持全球经济至关重要，”政府发言人告诉天空新闻台。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israel’s cabinet is set to convene today at 20:00 local time following the expected failure of U.S.–Iran negotiations. 🔹 Officials are expected to discuss the potential resumption of strikes on Iran, as tensions have escalated after talks in Pakistan collapsed. 🔹 In parallel, the General Staff has placed military forces on the highest level of readiness due to the risk of renewed conflict, with the IDF instructed to maintain immediate operational preparedness. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 在美伊谈判预期失败后，以色列内阁定于今天当地时间20:00召开会议。🔹 预计官员们将讨论恢复对伊朗打击的可能性，因为在巴基斯坦的会谈破裂后，紧张局势已经升级。🔹 与此同时，由于冲突重燃的风险，总参谋部已将军事力量置于最高戒备状态，并指示以色列国防军保持即时作战准备。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC: "Military vessels nearing the Strait of Hormuz will be deemed a ceasefire violation and will be handled firmly." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）：“接近霍尔木兹海峡的军事船只将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到坚决处理。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Channel 14: Heightened alert in Israel over the possibility that Iran could derail negotiations with a large-scale attack on Israeli territory. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 第14频道：以色列处于高度戒备状态，担心伊朗可能通过对以色列领土发动大规模袭击来破坏谈判。推文

text: The UK will not join the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 英国不会加入美国的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。

text: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 BREAKING: The UK says it will not take part in U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Trump claimed earlier today that ‘the UK will send warships to help, and probably other countries will too’. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 突发：英国表示不会参与美国的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。特朗普今天早些时候声称‘英国将派遣军舰提供帮助，其他国家可能也会这样做’。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Chairman of Knesset National Security Committee Tzvika Foghel mocks Trump: Donald, if you have to shoot, shoot. Don’t quack 🦆
text_zh: 以色列议会国家安全委员会主席茨维卡·福格尔（Tzvika Foghel）嘲讽特朗普：唐纳德，如果你要开枪，就开枪。别像鸭子一样嘎嘎叫 🦆

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Sky News: A British government spokesperson says that Britain will not participate in the U.S.’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. “We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, which is urgently needed to support the global economy and the cost of living back home. The Strait of Hormuz must not be subject to tolling. We are urgently working with France and other partners to put together a wide coalition to protect freedom of navigation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 天空新闻台：英国政府发言人表示，英国不会参与美国的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。“我们继续支持航行自由和海峡的开放，这对于支持全球经济和国内生活成本至关重要。霍尔木兹海峡不得被征收通行费。我们正紧急与法国和其他伙伴合作，组建一个广泛联盟来保护航行自由。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: A senior U.S. official said gaps between Washington and Tehran remain enormous, with no progress on uranium enrichment, dismantling nuclear facilities, removing enriched uranium from Iran, releasing frozen assets, halting proxy funding, or opening the Strait of Hormuz. No further talks have been scheduled. U.S. President Trump has decided to impose a naval blockade on Iran. Israel was updated in advance and welcomes the hard line. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：一位美国高级官员表示，华盛顿与德黑兰之间的分歧依然巨大，在铀浓缩、拆除核设施、从伊朗运出浓缩铀、释放冻结资产、停止资助代理人或开放霍尔木兹海峡等方面均无进展。目前没有安排进一步的会谈。美国总统特朗普已决定对伊朗实施海上封锁。以色列已提前获悉并对这一强硬路线表示欢迎。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 | Iranian MP, Nabavian, who was present as part of the Iranian delegation in Islamabad: There were 3 serious disagreements in the talks (with the US,) 3 demands Iran did not accept. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 | 伊朗议员纳巴维安（Nabavian），作为伊朗代表团成员出席了伊斯兰堡会谈：会谈中存在3个严重分歧（与美国），伊朗没有接受3项要求。@FotrosResistancee

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 A member of Iran’s delegation in Islamabad, MP Seyyed Mohammad Nabavian: Some reasons for the non-agreement with America: 1. They wanted a joint share with Iran in the benefits of the Strait of Hormuz!! 2. They wanted our 60% enriched uranium to be shipped out of Iran. 3. They wanted to deprive Iran of the right to enrich uranium for 20 years. @Middle_East_Spectator ✍ They also requested Iran abandon its allies and sign a comprehensive peace deal in the Middle East They also requested Iran to dismantle all its nuclear infrastructure including the scientific schools for it. The same terms they demanded before the war they are demanding again now. If Iran wanted to accept this they wouldn't have sacrificed their finest then
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰堡代表团成员、议员赛义德·穆罕默德·纳巴维安（Seyyed Mohammad Nabavian）：未能与美国达成协议的部分原因：1. 他们想与伊朗共同分享霍尔木兹海峡的利益！！2. 他们想把我们60%的浓缩铀运出伊朗。3. 他们想剥夺伊朗20年内浓缩铀的权利。@Middle_East_Spectator ✍ 他们还要求伊朗放弃盟友并签署一份中东全面和平协议。他们还要求伊朗拆除所有核基础设施，包括相关的科学学校。他们现在要求的条款与战争前要求的一模一样。如果伊朗想接受这些，当初就不会牺牲他们最优秀的人了

text: ❗️ The Israeli army is implementing the directives it got in Gaza in Lebanon: Wipe out all of the south Lebanon security strip area by demolishing eve ry Lebanese town and bulldozing all forests, green, farms, and any human infrastructure. And once done, create a wider security strip that doesn't include Israeli presence but is controlled by Israeli fire though targeting anyone near the area up to 8-10 km from the Lebanese border
text_zh: ❗️ 以色列军队正在黎巴嫩实施其在加沙的指令：通过拆除黎巴嫩的每一个城镇，推平所有森林、绿地、农场和任何人类基础设施，彻底摧毁黎巴嫩南部的安全地带。一旦完成，创建一个更广泛的安全地带，不包括以色列的存在，但由以色列的火力控制，通过瞄准距离黎巴嫩边境8-10公里内区域的任何人

text: Maybe we can also change the name of Bkerkeh to Husseiniet Imam Ali Khamenie too
text_zh: 也许我们也可以把Bkerkeh的名字改成伊玛目阿里·哈梅内伊侯赛因（Husseiniet Imam Ali Khamenie）

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: Hezbullah released phenomenal footage of a suicide drone launch towards an Israeli army gathering point in the town of Taybeh The Israeli forces were located using ground intelligence and then information was related to the targeting team ⭕ بالفيديو | مشاهد من عملية استهداف المقاومة الإسلامية تموضع لجنود جيش العدو الإسرائيلي في بلدة الطيبة جنوبي لبنان بمسيّرة انقضاضيّة. جودة عالية #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: 真主党发布了令人震惊的自杀式无人机发射画面，目标是黎巴嫩南部塔耶贝镇（Taybeh）的一个以色列军队集结点。以色列军队的位置是通过地面情报定位的，随后信息被传达给目标小组 ⭕ 视频 | 真主党伊斯兰抵抗运动使用自杀式无人机瞄准黎巴嫩南部塔耶贝镇敌方以色列军队士兵阵地的行动画面。高质量 #军事媒体

text: 🇮🇷 What was denied in the past 24 hours — Quotes attributed to Araghchi about the negotiations and his response to Vance's behavior during the talks. — Entry of American vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. — Presence of four countries China, Russia, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar in the negotiations. — Landing of a plane in Islamabad and the joining of an Iranian official to the negotiations during the talks. — Sending weapons and military and defense equipment from China to Iran. — Airborne enemy forces in the Qalaei area of Selseleh County, Lorestan.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 过去24小时内被否认的内容 — 归因于阿拉格希关于谈判的引述，以及他对万斯在会谈中行为的回应。 — 美国船只进入霍尔木兹海峡。 — 中国、俄罗斯、沙特阿拉伯和卡塔尔四个国家参加谈判。 — 飞机在伊斯兰堡降落，以及伊朗官员在会谈期间加入谈判。 — 中国向伊朗运送武器和军事防御装备。 — 敌方空降部队在洛雷斯坦省塞尔塞莱县（Selseleh County）的Qalaei地区。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan : A senior Israeli security official said Israel wants to renew the war against Iran, arguing that Operation Roaring Lion was halted too early without sufficient pressure on Tehran over its nuclear and ballistic missile programmes. Israel is awaiting U.S. President Trump’s decision, while the IDF is preparing alongside U.S. forces for a renewed campaign, including an American troop buildup in the region with ground troops. If a green light is given, Israel intends to strike Iranian national infrastructure and energy facilities to exert economic pressure until Tehran agrees to give up its nuclear programme. U.S. Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper is expected to visit Israel tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：一位以色列高级安全官员表示，以色列希望重启对伊战争，认为“咆哮狮子行动”（Operation Roaring Lion）结束得太早，没有对德黑兰的核计划和弹道导弹计划施加足够的压力。以色列正在等待美国总统特朗普的决定，同时以色列国防军正与美军一道为重启行动做准备，包括美军在地区增加地面部队。如果获得绿灯，以色列打算打击伊朗的国家基础设施和能源设施，以施加经济压力，直到德黑兰同意放弃其核计划。美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）海军上将预计将于明天访问以色列。@wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: A staggering 68% of Americans say they are ‘worried’ about the current state of the war with Iran, with 57% saying they feel ‘stressed’ @Middle_East_Spectatir
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：高达68%的美国人表示他们对当前与伊朗的战争状态感到‘担忧’，57%的人表示感到‘压力巨大’ @Middle_East_Spectatir

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇺🇸 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will convene a limited security cabinet this evening. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 14: Israel is on heightened alert over the possibility that Iran may derail negotiations by launching a widespread attack on Israeli territory. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇺🇸 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡将于今晚召开有限安全内阁会议。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列第14频道：以色列处于高度戒备状态，担心伊朗可能通过对以色列领土发动大规模袭击来破坏谈判。@wfwitness

text: — This is how little the Americans care about their ‘allies’ in the Persian Gulf btw. They don’t care if you get hit, even in the slightest. Signing the Abraham Accords, staying silent on Palestinian genocide, enforcing rampant secularization — none of it matters, all you are is a cash cow to America. They don’t even consider you within their calculations. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 顺便说一句，美国人对他们在波斯湾的‘盟友’有多么不在乎。他们根本不在乎你是否受到打击，哪怕是一点点。签署《亚伯拉罕协议》、对巴勒斯坦种族灭绝保持沉默、强制推行猖獗的世俗化——这一切都不重要，你对美国来说只是一个摇钱树。他们甚至没有把你纳入他们的考量范围。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Polls have opened in Hungary’s national elections, with Prime Minister Viktor Orbán facing challenger Péter Magyar after 16 years of Orbán’s rule. Orbán leads the ruling Fidesz party, and has built his platform around nationalist policies and a confrontational…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Polls have closed in Hungary’s parliamentary election, with turnout at 77.8% as of 18:30 local time, significantly higher than the 67.8% recorded in the 2022 vote. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺匈牙利全国选举投票开始，总理维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）在执政16年后，面临挑战者彼得·马扎尔。欧尔班领导执政的青民盟，并围绕民族主义政策和对抗性立场建立了他的纲领……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举投票结束，截至当地时间18:30，投票率为77.8%，显著高于2022年投票时记录的67.8%。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Approaching the Strait of Hormuz with military vessels will be considered a violation of the ceasefire. - IRGC In its 59th official statement, the Public Relations office of Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy rejected claims made by hostile officials and affirmed that the Strait of Hormuz remains open and under secure, controlled management. Civilian vessels continue to pass safely under established regulations. The IRGC Navy also stated that any military vessel attempting to approach the Strait, under any pretext, will be treated as a breach of the ceasefire and will face a firm and decisive response. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 接近霍尔木兹海峡的军事船只将被视为违反停火协议。- 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）在其第59份官方声明中，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军公共关系办公室驳斥了敌对官员的说法，并确认霍尔木兹海峡保持开放，处于安全、受控的管理之下。民用船只继续在既定法规下安全通过。伊斯兰革命卫队海军还表示，任何以任何借口试图接近海峡的军事船只，都将被视为违反停火协议，并将面临坚决和果断的回应。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, Defence Minister Katz and the IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir held a security situation assessment inside Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu visited southern Lebanon with the Israeli defense minister Israel Katz and IDF chief of staff Eyal Zamir, stating that “the war continues, including inside the security zone in Lebanon.” He said Israel has thwarted the threat of invasion from Lebanon and is pushing back anti‑tank fire and rockets, but more work remains. “Our enemies – Iran and the axis of evil – came to destroy us, and now they are simply fighting for their survival. We have changed the face of the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡、国防部长卡茨和以色列国防军参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔在黎巴嫩境内进行了安全局势评估。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡与以色列国防部长以色列·卡茨及以色列国防军参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔访问了黎巴嫩南部，称“战争仍在继续，包括在黎巴嫩境内的安全区内。”他说以色列已经挫败了来自黎巴嫩的入侵威胁，并正在击退反坦克火力和火箭弹，但仍有工作要做。“我们的敌人——伊朗和邪恶轴心——曾想摧毁我们，而现在他们只是在为生存而战。我们已经改变了中东的面貌。” @wfwitness
